channel.description: Spring 2026 Week 1 Instructors Russ Feldhausen Dr. Nathan Bean Dr. Josh Weese Dr. Safia Malallah Dr. Friday James Dr. David Allen TAs & GTAs Robert Stewart Timothy Tucker Josh Barron Sicheng Chen Manny Adeniji Zyada Mekonnen Supriya Bolla ... and more! Flexible Schedule Welcome New Teachers! No Late Penalties Easy Incomplete Grades Deadlines Not Enforced CC 710 and CC 711 Concurrent Grading Usually within 1 Week CC 710 Quizzes - Auto CC 710 Writing - Manual CC 711 Labs - Partial CC 711 Quizzes - Manual CC 730 & CC 750 - Auto Ping us if we miss something! Getting Help Ed Discussion Scheduled Office Hours By Appointment Hours Help Emails Advice Make steady progress Try to do something each week Stuck? Ask for Help! Questions & Ideas Welcome Upcoming Summer & Fall Enrollment Summer Workshop & Conference Late May / Early June Curriculum Requests & Rollout Enrollment CC 710 & CC 711 -> EDCI 765 Summer CC 730 Fall CC 730 -> CC 750 Fall EDCI 768 or 769 Spring Tuition Payments Ongoing!
